transcript: [no speech, typing and notification sounds only]
on_screen_text:
Riya mujhe ek problem hai [Riya, I have a problem]
English thodi samajh aati hai, par bol nahi pata [I understand English a bit, but can't speak it]
Office mein meetings mein chup rehna padta hai [I have to stay quiet in office meetings]
Boss ke samne bol nahi pata, promotion atka hua [Can't speak in front of the boss, promotion is stuck]
Mujhe lagta hai bina english, career hi khatam hai [I feel without English, my career is over]
Aree, aisa bilkul bhi nahi hai [Oh, it's not like that at all]
Roz thodi der mujhse chat kar..... [Chat with me for a little while every day.....]
Main tujhe step by step sikhaungi [I will teach you step by step]
Galti karega toh main turant correct karungi [If you make a mistake, I will correct you immediately]
Thode hi din mein tu meeting mein confidently bol raha hoga [In just a few days, you will be speaking confidently in meetings]
Sacch?! [Really?!]
Matlab abhi bhi promotion ka chance hai? [Meaning there is still a chance for promotion?]
Bilkul! [Absolutely!]
Aur respect bhi double milegi [And you'll get double the respect too]
Aaj hi download kar MySivi App ko! [Download the MySivi App today!]
Done [Done]
summary: A simulated chat conversation depicts a professional struggling with English speaking skills, which hinders their career growth and promotions. The chat partner recommends downloading the MySivi App to practice daily and receive instant corrections. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app for career advancement.
